placeholders.customComplaint: e.g. Joint pain, skin rash, vision problems...
placeholders.observations: Any additional observations about the patient's condition...
placeholders.reviewReason: Why does this case need manual review?

consent.title: Patient consent obtained *
consent.intro: I confirm that the patient (or their guardian) has been informed about and consented to:
items: Collection and storage of their health information
Use of AI-assisted triage for clinical decision support
Sharing of data with healthcare providers at the PHC

review.title: Request human review
review.description: Flag this case for explicit clinician review before disposition.

result.savedLocallyWithTriage: Preliminary AI triage shown above. Full analysis will be available when connectivity is restored.
result.savedLocallyNoTriage: It will be submitted automatically when connectivity is restored.
result.emergencySmsTitle: Facility offline — sent an alert instead?
result.emergencySmsDescription: This case is offline and classified EMERGENCY. If the facility has cell signal, send a workflow alert by SMS so staff know to check the queue as soon as this device reconnects. This message carries no patient details.
result.emergencySmsBody: VitalNet ALERT: an EMERGENCY-classified case is queued offline at this facility's ASHA worker device. Please check the VitalNet queue as soon as possible. This is an automated workflow alert, not a clinical recommendation.
result.emergencySmsNoNumber: No facility phone number on file — choose a contact manually in your messaging app.
result.ambulanceCallDescription: Call 108, India's national ambulance and emergency helpline. This works over a normal phone call, even without a data connection. Availability depends on your area — it may not be reachable everywhere.
result.contraindicationTitle: Possible contraindication — verify with a clinician
result.patientKeyDescription: Save or photograph this code — bring it to the next visit so staff can find this patient's history.
result.historyNone: No prior visits found for this code.

preliminary.label: Preliminary triage
preliminary.lowConfidence: ⚠ Model uncertain on this case — please have a clinician review carefully.
preliminary.sendingOnline: Sending to server for full analysis…
preliminary.sendingOffline: Offline — queued for sync. Full briefing will appear for the doctor when connectivity returns.

errors.consentRequired: Patient consent is required before submitting case data.
errors.validationFailed: Please fix the validation errors below before submitting.
errors.queueFull: Offline queue is full (50 cases). Connect to internet to sync before submitting more cases.
errors.patientKeyInvalid: Code must be in the format XXXX-XXXX (no 0/O/1/I/L)

voice.unsupported: Voice input is not supported on this device
voice.offline: Voice input needs an internet connection
voice.failed: Voice input failed — please type instead

hints.patientKey: Leave blank for a new patient — a code will be generated after submission so staff can recognize them next visit.
